title: cleyera incornuta
intro: Cleyera incornuta, also known as Japanese Cleyera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cleyera incornuta include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve immune function. Cleyera incornuta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
